This extension provides access to a bookmarks menu.

How to use:

- Click with the left mouse button to open a bookmark in the current tab.
- Use the middle mouse button or the left mouse button while holding down the Ctrl key to open a bookmark in a new tab.
- To instantly switch to a newly opened tab with a bookmark, press the middle mouse button while holding down the Shift key.
- Press the left mouse button with the Shift key held down to launch a bookmark in a new window.
- Click the middle button on a folder to open all its bookmarks in separate tabs.
- Right-click to bring up the context menu.

In the settings panel, you can choose to conceal certain bookmarks or folders, which is particularly handy if you're syncing bookmarks across various computers.
Torq AI: ChatGPT Powered AI Assistant
Harnessing the prowess of ChatGPT to revolutionize your productivity through advanced AI assistance.

Introducing Torq AI, your advanced browsing assistant powered by state-of-the-art AI capabilities. This innovative Chrome Extension is built to elevate your browsing experience, bolster productivity, and offer a suite of new features including our brand new "Sidebar". No matter the browsing context, be it engaging with your Gmail or needing smarter, AI-integrated responses, Torq AI is your solution to streamline workflow.

With Torq AI, you don't just have instant access to the data you need; you have an intelligent assistant enhancing your browsing experience at every step. From generating smart responses to assisting with real-time Gmail suggestions, Torq AI is your go-to for effective and engaging web navigation.

⭐️ Key Features ⭐️

1️⃣ AI Smart Reply and Response Generation

- Engage in dynamic conversations about any topic on the web with your personal AI assistant, Torq AI.
- Benefit from smart response generation, quick answer provision, and simplification of complex texts you're reading.

- How to use it? ⬇️
- Interact with Torq AI by selecting text and clicking on the Torq AI icon for inquiries about your selected reading.

2️⃣ Gmail Smart Reply Feature

- Smoothly navigate your Gmail communications with the aid of Torq AI's Smart Reply feature, offering real-time suggestions for responses.

3️⃣ Efficient Data Access

- Leverage Torq AI for quick access to essential information, thus streamlining your workflow and saving precious time.

4️⃣ Seamless Browsing Experience

- Experience a highly responsive and stable user interface, guaranteeing smoother transitions and superior usability.

5️⃣ Newly Introduced Sidebar

- Engage in an interactive AI chat, manage bookmarks and folders, access quick links, and customise the sidebar according to your needs.

Torq AI is FREE and does not require any CREDIT CARD.

🧑‍🏫 Introduction to Torq AI: 

Torq AI is here to transform your browsing experience. With our cutting-edge AI technology, you can generate smart responses, receive real-time Gmail suggestions, and have immediate access to required data. Torq AI offers you a seamless, efficient browsing journey, saving time and making web navigation intuitive and easy.

Experience the power of an AI assistant that enhances your browsing experience wherever you go. Simply install the Torq AI Chrome Extension and click on the Torq AI icon on the right side of the browser to start a smart and efficient interaction with the AI.

➕ What is Torq AI?

Torq AI is an intelligent browsing assistant empowered with advanced AI technology. It's designed to facilitate smart responses to inquiries, improve Gmail communications, and offer an efficient web navigation experience. Torq AI is here to boost your productivity by offering an enhanced browsing experience.

➕ How to utilise Sidebar in Torq AI?

Access Torq AI's Side Bar by using the Alt + T shortcut, and utilise the AI chat with the Alt + C shortcut or the trigger on the right of the page for a seamlessly interactive and customisable browsing experience.

➕ How do I utilise AI and Torq AI in Chrome?

To use Torq AI on Chrome, install the Torq AI Chrome extension from the Chrome Web Store. After installation, you can start interacting with Torq AI on any website, enjoying smart AI responses and improved Gmail communication.

➕ Subscribe to us for more!

https://www.torq.live

Stay updated with Torq AI, your advanced Chrome Extension for an engaging browsing experience. Enjoy the power of AI in your browsing journey with Torq AI!


Release Notes:
v1.0.1

🐛 Bug Fixes:

Chat Issue Resolved: 🛠 We've addressed an issue where some chats created by Torq were not opening on ChatGPT. Users should now experience a seamless chat experience without any hiccups.

✨ New Features & Enhancements:

Event Tracking for Torq Interactions: 📊 To better understand user interactions and improve the overall experience, we've introduced event tracking for interactions with Torq components. 🛡 We prioritise your privacy, and we want to assure you that events are sent only when you interact with Torq components. Importantly, no personally identifiable information (PII) is being used or collected. Your data remains confidential, and we're committed to maintaining the highest privacy standards.

v1.0.2

🐛 Bug Fixes:

Minor bug fixes done
Use AI to automatically organize your browser bookmarks and say goodbye to chaos.

Tired of thousands of messy bookmarks? Ceep is an AI-powered Chrome extension designed to help you solve bookmark clutter once and for all through intelligent categorization, automatic archiving.

🚀 Key Features:
- AI One-click Organize: With just one click, AI automatically identifies bookmark content and categorizes it into the most appropriate folder.
- AI Sidebar Conversation: A conversational experience like gemini. Trigger an Agent to perform tasks with natural language commands (e.g., "Help me organize all my tech bookmarks").
- Sensitive Action Protection: High-sensitivity operations like deleting bookmarks or folders require your manual confirmation to ensure data safety.
- System Cleanup: Automatically identify and clean up empty folders to keep your bookmark bar clean.
- Branded Model Support: Supports Ceep Basic (Free) and Ceep Pro (Advanced Models) to meet different user needs.

🔒 Privacy & Security:
We understand the importance of your bookmarks. Ceep only reads bookmark metadata (titles and URLs) for AI processing and never collects or stores any of your private browsing data.

Let Ceep be your right-hand man for knowledge management. Start your clean bookmark journey today!
Nice NewTab | Minimalist new tabs and focused workbench
Quickly searching bookmarks and web pages, setting today's goals, starting the tomato clock and focusing on the workbench.

🎉 Nice NewTab v0.0.4 Release Notes

✨ New Features
📊 Pomodoro Statistics & History Tracking
•  Real-time statistics of completed Pomodoros and focused minutes
•  View recent activity history to track daily progress
•  Support for resetting statistics and exporting history
•  Visual display of your focus achievements

🎵 White Noise for Focus
•  Multiple white noise types: Rain, Ocean Waves, Forest...
•  Precise volume control to create the perfect focus environment
•  One-click on/off without interrupting your Pomodoro timer
•  Help you quickly enter the flow state

⏰ Time & Date Format Customization
•  Switch between 12-hour and 24-hour time formats
•  Choose from 6 date format options (Auto, Short, MM/DD, DD/MM, YYYY/MM/DD, Long)
•  Toggle seconds display
•  Toggle weekday display
•  Show timezone information (PST, CST, etc.)

🍅 Pomodoro enhanced
•  Pause/Resume function: You can pause and resume the Pomodoro in progress
•  Break Time Management:
•  Support short rest (default 5 minutes)
•  Supports long rests (default 15 minutes)
•  You can skip the break and start a new Pomodoro directly
•  Focus Mode Optimization: Improved the state management of the focus mask to ensure correct display when the Pomodoro is running

Appearance Customization
•  Text color customization for the main page
•  Search box styling: background color, opacity, border radius
•  "Reset Appearance" button to restore default settings

Wallpaper Enhancements
•  Multiple wallpaper sources: Local, Picsum random, Bing daily
•  Download current wallpaper
•  Online wallpaper history for quick switching

Productivity Tools
•  Quick Links panel for frequently visited sites
•  Todo List with priority support
•  Today's Goal display on main page
•  Custom quotes/motivational messages

Search Improvements
•  Search engine quick-switch bar

🎨 UI Improvements
•  Enhanced bookmark search results styling
•  Unified corner button interactions
•  Improved scrollbar design

🔧 Fixes
•  Fixed missing i18n translations
•  Synced settings between panel and options page

0.0.3 Released.
1. Fixed the problem of Tomato clock stopping failure
2. Fixed the problem of setting failure
3. Add search engine selection settings, add clock and search box display switch settings
4. Add multiple search engines and AI quick links

0.0.2 Released.
1. added a new custom wallpaper option, users can replace their own wallpaper
2. Added several search options, and will continue to add AI functions.
3. Optimize the UI of Tomato Clock's reminder mask pop-up box.
4. New plug-in settings interface
5. Update the icon of About page
6. Fix a number of display exceptions

🎉🎉🎉
First Release.
1. Quick Search
Quickly search your bookmarks and web pages.
2. Today's Goal
Set daily goals to improve efficiency.

Use pomodoro technique to improve concentration and efficiency.

Some of these features will be added in subsequent releases, so stay tuned!

Bookmark Manager helps you to manage saved bookmarks in new tab

The bookmark manager is more like a productivity app, it helps you keep track of items you find on the web in your browser so that you can revisit them later. With an app like this, you can save and organize contents to view later without worrying about losing them. Also, it allows you to access bookmarked content in browser new tab.

By clicking "Add to Chrome", I accept and agree to installing the Bookmark Manager Chrome extension and setting Chrome™ New Tab, Homepage takeover, and Search to that provided by the service with search results by Bing and the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. 

Included features:
- Save any web link online. Any web content that you bookmark gets saved inside your Bookmark Extension just one click.
- Add / Edit Custom urls. The best features of this extension, we can add custom url & also edit our custom links as per required.
- Searchable. We can search every links inside the bookmarks using search bar.
- Make folder & subfolder. My favorite feature of Bookmark Manger is its ability to organize bookmarks. Not only you can create different folders for your bookmarks but each folder can also contain lists of web links.

Stop wasting time looking for the tab you want to switch to - see all your tabs in one place!

Stop wasting time hunting for the right tab, or that link from two weeks ago!

Switching tabs takes, on average, 3 seconds; it's estimated that, in the course of a single day, some people switch tabs up to 1000 times - that could be almost an hour each day, wasted, just looking for the right tab. 

Tab-o-Magic makes finding the tab you need absolutely effortless - just open a new tab, and you'll see all your tabs, clearly laid out and organized, making it easy quickly switch to the tab you need.

To make things even better, Tab-o-Magic offers an intuitive, powerful search feature. Type a few letters of what you're looking for, and Tab-o-Magic will show matches from your open tabs, your bookmarks, browser history, and downloads. Now you can close that tab you've been holding onto for months, because you know that Tab-o-Magic will make it easy to get back to in an instant.

Tab-o-Magic also offers tons of features to manage your browser:

* create groups of tabs just by dragging and dropping tabs together
* add, remove, and edit your bookmarks
* close whole sets of tabs at once
* copy lists of links to your clipboard, making it easy to share with others

With Tab-o-Magic, privacy is a top priority. All your data stays on your browser, with no data transmitted outside. Your activity is private and secure.

Make tab overload a thing of the past. Install Tab-o-Magic today and discover a cleaner, faster, and more organized browsing experience!
Chrome-laajennos suomalaisille kätköilijöille. Linkkaa Chromen tyhjälle tabille olennaiset kätköilysivustot ja hakukentät.

Laajennos korvaa Google Chromen oman sivun, joka näkyy kun avaat uuden tabin. Jos olet geokätköilijä, niin tyypillisesti vierailet tietyillä geokätköilysivuilla. Laajennos tuo nämä sivut suoraan klikattavaksi uuden tabin näkymässä Chromessa. Laajennos sisältää myös kenttiä erilaisia yleisiä geokätköilyyn liittyviä hakuja varten. Voit siis etsiä kätköä, matkaaja tai vaikka kirjoitusta Suomen suosituimmasta geokätköilyblogista suoraan uuden tabin näkymästä. Geokätköilylinkkien lisäksi uudelle tabille ilmestyy useimmiten vierailtujen sivustojen linkkilista.

Save, share, and find bookmarks in one click. Personal collections and shared team workspaces, with fast import and instant search.

Bookmarks are a necessary evil. Lost in folders. Buried in browsers. Impossible to share. Almost no one bookmarks the way they actually want to — and almost no one can collaborate on bookmarks with their team, family, or friends.

Bookmark It fixes that.

It's the only bookmarking app that combines real ease of use, real organization power, and real collaboration in a single place — for yourself, your team, and everyone in between.

🚀 Get started in seconds
● One-click import from your existing Chrome bookmarks bar
● One-click import from your browser history
● No spreadsheets, no copy-paste, no re-saving
● Free plan with no credit card. Ever.

👤 Personal  +  👥 Team workspaces
● Keep a private collection just for you
● Spin up a shared workspace for your team, family, or side project
● Invite anyone in seconds — everyone sees the latest version, every time
● No more "send me that link again" in Slack, Messages, or email

🔍 Find anything in one click
● Recently Viewed history puts the page you're looking for one click away
● Instant search across every bookmark in every workspace
● Collections, tags, and notes that scale from 10 bookmarks to 10,000

📌 Bookmark from anywhere
● Browser extension — save the active tab with one click
● Menubar app — save and search without leaving what you're doing
● Web app — organize and manage from any device
● Title, URL, and page details pre-filled so saving really is one click

💬 Built for collaboration
● Share entire collections, not just single links
● Add notes and context so teammates understand why a bookmark matters
● Organize together — for work projects, family hubs, reading lists, travel planning, recipe collections, anything

🪄 More than a bookmark manager
● Boosted productivity — spend less time searching, more time doing
● Onboarding made easy — new teammates get the full knowledge hub on day one
● Cross-platform — your bookmarks follow you across browsers and devices
● Upstream from the browser into a dedicated app you'll actually open

Stop losing links in chat threads. Stop emailing yourself URLs. Stop maintaining bookmarks five different places. Bookmark It is the home for every link that matters — personal, professional, and everything in between.

🔒 Privacy first
● We will never sell or share your data
● Imports are optional and read-only — we never modify your native browser bookmarks
● Page content is never sent to our servers

Try Bookmark It today, free, forever.
Easy way to browse and organize your Bookmarks, History, Downloads and much more

One click will bring you to your favorite bookmarks, downloads, history, top visited sites and more! No more endless browsers menu to view your bookmarks, access all your browsing needs in just one click!

You may remove this extension at any time from the chrome extension page.
Surf the web, dictate, and much more with just your voice

Web Assist is your gateway to a brand new browsing experience. With just your voice, you can easily navigate the web, interact with web pages, dictate messages, and perform a wide range of tasks without using your hands. Web Assist includes dozens of voice commands that replace the need to use the mouse or keyboard. 

Key Features

Effortless Browsing: Scroll through web pages, play videos, click on elements such as links, and much more using simple voice commands. To provide additional flexibility, there are several shortcut keys that you can use in place of the most commonly used voice commands. 

Explore the Web:  Search the web with Google, open websites, go back and forth between tabs, and bookmark your favorite sites. 

Voice-Controlled Dictation:  Dictate emails, fill out forms, and more.  Other related features include automatic text formatting. 

Apps Included:  Dictate using the text editor app. Create, play, and save audio recordings from your microphone with the voice/audio recorder app. 

Premium Features:  Upgrade to Web Assist Premium to create custom shortcut commands to open pages that you visit regularly, save custom template commands to input commonly used text snippets into any input field, control recognition when the page loads, start recognition with your voice, and change the timeout setting. 

Excellent Performance: Uses the browser’s fast, reliable, and accurate speech to text technology. Also has support for the Edge browser.

Privacy is Paramount:  Have confidence that your privacy is our top priority. No audio, transcripts, or other data is ever sent to our servers. Your personal information and activities remain yours. 

Benefits

Increased Productivity: Save time and boost productivity by using your voice to dictate and navigate the web without touching the keyboard. 

No Cost to Use Basic Features:  Web Assist is free to download and offers many features to get you started on your voice-powered experience.  

Free Voice-Controlled Dictation: Unlike other options on the market, our basic free package includes full access to voice-controlled dictation features. 

Enhanced Accessibility: Web Assist has been designed to empower those with physical challenges by providing a speech recognition solution that makes browsing the web simple and fast. 

Ready to get started? 

Explore a new approach to browsing the web with Web Assist.  Download it for free and start enjoying the power of voice controlled web surfing today.  Whether you're looking to save time, enhance accessibility, or try something new, Web Assist is here to make your online experience smoother and more enjoyable. You can try out our demos starting here: https://webassistextension.com/tabs.html.
Save tab groups or all tabs inside a window as a single bookmark.

somanytabs allows you to save tab groups or all tabs inside a window as a single bookmark.
You can use Chrome to sync it across all your devices and when you open the bookmark, your tabs and groups will be restored.
You can type the command to help you do something.

✨Features

Enter simple commands to quickly find the specified tab!

📋 Lists

Too many tabs (with compressed title names) and you don't know which one to choose?
Don't worry!
The list command displays a list of all the tabs and helps you make the choice!

⭐ Bookmarks

When you want to find a bookmark, you can use the "regular expression" to help you, for example:
  > bm-file . 
    Find your bookmarks

  > bm-file (google|news)
    It will help you filter the bookmarks with the title containing google or news

🔒 Secure

▸ This package does not collect personal information.
▸ The bookmark only provides queries, not to change anything.
A pink bookmarks extension with cute folder icons and right-click features to save your favorite webpages to Pretty Links collection

Pretty Links: The Cutest Way to Organize Your Bookmarks! 🌸✨

What is Pretty Links?
Pretty Links is a charming bookmarks extension designed to make managing your bookmarks as cute as can be! With a soft strawberry pink theme and customizable folder icons, it turns your browser into an adorable hub for all your favorite links.

What Can Pretty Links Do?

Customizable Folders: Personalize your folders with icons like bows, hearts, and stars for a unique, stylish look.
Right-Click to Save: Quickly bookmark any webpage by right-clicking and adding it to your Pretty Links collection.
Navigate Between Folders: Move seamlessly between folders to keep your bookmarks organized and easy to find.
Simple & Fun to Use: Managing bookmarks has never been this enjoyable or visually delightful!
Why Use Pretty Links?
If you’re tired of plain, boring bookmark managers, Pretty Links is here to add a touch of magic to your browsing experience. Perfect for anyone who loves customization, organization, and a super cute aesthetic!

Transform your bookmarks into something pretty and practical—download Pretty Links now and make your browser shine! 💖

FasterMe is a powerful Chrome extension that will help you learn new tools quickly and easily to improve efficiency and reach full…

FasterMe is a powerful Chrome extension that will help you learn new tools quickly and easily to improve efficiency and reach full productivity potential.

It is designed to help users be more productive and efficient with their work. Whether you're a student, freelancer, or professional, this extension can help you streamline your workflow and save valuable time.

Try it now with a 7-day free trial.

One of the key features of FasterMe is its ability to help users learn new shortcuts for their work. This is especially useful for those new to certain applications or software who need help navigating them quickly and efficiently. With FasterMe, you'll be able to access all of the shortcuts you need to get your work done faster and more efficiently.

The extension works with popular applications such as Google Sheets, Docs, Figma, Github, and more. We are constantly working to improve the extension and add more supported applications, so you can expect to see new features and supported apps added in the future.

FasterMe provides a versatile advantage with its custom shortcuts feature, applicable across multiple apps and websites. This functionality empowers you to optimize your workflow by creating personalized shortcuts for various actions and keys.

FasterMe very easy to use. It runs in the background, so you don't need to worry about it getting in the way of your work, and it has a simple, user-friendly interface that makes it easy to navigate and access the shortcuts you need.

Overall, FasterMe is a powerful, easy-to-use Chrome extension that can help you increase productivity and efficiency with your work. Whether you're new to certain applications or just looking to streamline your workflow, this extension is a must-have tool for anyone looking to boost their productivity and save valuable time.
